examples: Don't let yon dog nod off.
I hope he'll give the nod to the plan.
She could only nod, because her mouth was full.
Pwysleisiodd Leighton Andrews AC taw nod y cynllun yw gwella safonau mewn ysgolion ac nid creu tablau perfformio.
And I think all those working mothers out there would probably nod in agreement.
